scenario: HELIX passive adapter + anomaly detector running against live GO2 topics

fault_details.detail: Z-score 4.41 exceeded threshold on 3 consecutive samples
Z-score 3.28 exceeded threshold on 3 consecutive samples

expected_effect: HELIX adapter observes GO2 topics and emits FaultEvent when anomalies detected
observed_effect: Adapter successfully monitored 5 GO2 topics. AnomalyDetector detected 2 FaultEvents (Z-score violations in robot_pose rate). Multiple Z-score warnings for gnss, multiplestate, cloud, imu rate variations.
supports_claim: Adapter-based HELIX detection works on live GO2 hardware; reproduces April 3 detection capability in a second session (reproducibility evidence)
notes: Bag recorder for /helix/faults couldn't serialize FaultEvent (custom msg type not sourced by recorder). Fault data captured via measure_helix_overhead.py FaultCounter node instead.
